name: Carl Lentz
role: Former Lead Pastor, Hillsong Church New York
incident: Carl Lentz, lead pastor of Hillsong New York who built a celebrity congregation including Justin Bieber and Kevin Durant while preaching extensively about sexual integrity and moral leadership, was fired by Hillsong founder Brian Houston on November 4, 2020 for moral failures. Lentz subsequently admitted to infidelity. A former housekeeper later filed a lawsuit alleging Lentz had sexually coerced her beginning in 2016.
